channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Kasparian: Trump tariffs about renegotiating trade deals, not jobs
item.description: Kasparian doesn't think Trump's tariffs are aimed at bringing factory jobs back despite what the president has said.
item.dc:creator: Leland Vittert, NewsNation

item.title: RFK Jr. says he plans to tell CDC to stop recommending fluoride in drinking water
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — U.S. Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. on Monday said he plans to tell the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention to stop recommending fluoridation in communities nationwide.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM and MIKE STOBBE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Garbage piles up on Birmingham's streets as a sanitation strike in the UK city enters its 5th week
item.description: LONDON (AP) — There is a stink rising over the United Kingdom's second-largest city. Garbage has piled up for a month in Birmingham during a dispute between the city and its trash collectors. It is a sore sight for eyes and offensive to the nose.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MELLEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Epic Universe opens a portal to the future of theme parks
item.description: As Universal Orlando Resort gears up for the highly anticipated May 22 opening of Epic Universe, it’s clear the resort is entering a new era - one that could redefine what a theme park can offer families.
item.dc:creator: Scott Gustin, KRON4

item.title: US airline partners with ICE in long-term deal to carry out deportation flights
item.description: An airline known for operating ultra-low cost flights out of smaller U.S. airports has signed an agreement with the U.S. Department of Homeland Security’s (DHS) Immigration Control and Enforcement agency to carry out deportation flights.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Photos: Step inside Universal's 'Epic' new theme park
item.description: Universal Orlando has revealed the first details of its highly anticipated new theme park, Epic Universe, which will officially open on May 22.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Jay North, TV's mischievous Dennis the Menace, dies at 73
item.description: LAKE BUTLER, Fla. (AP) — Jay North, who starred as the towheaded mischief maker on TV's “Dennis the Menace” for four seasons starting in 1959, has died. He was 73.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: South Carolina's highest court refuses to stop second firing squad execution
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — South Carolina's highest court on Monday rejected the last major appeal from Mikal Mahdi, who is scheduled to die by firing squad later this week for the ambush killing of an off-duty police officer.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Chief Justice Roberts pauses order to return Maryland dad mistakenly deported to El Salvador
item.description: Chief Justice John Roberts agreed Monday to pause a midnight deadline for the Trump administration to return a Maryland man mistakenly deported to a notorious prison in El Salvador.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Small airplane skids off runway into bay during botched landing at Oregon airport
item.description: Airport officials confirmed that five people were hospitalized after a small plane skidded off the runway at an Oregon airport and crashed into the water Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senator says he was joking about using violence against journalists
item.description: Sen. Markwayne Mullin, R-Okla., suggested that a lot "less false stories" would be written by journalists if they got into physical altercations with politicians.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: Judge dismisses former Mississippi governor's defamation lawsuit against news outlet
item.description: JACKSON, Miss. (AP) — A judge has dismissed a lawsuit by former Mississippi Gov. Phil Bryant that claimed a local news outlet defamed him in public comments about its Pulitzer Prize-winning reporting on the misspending of $77 million in federal welfare funds.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump threatens additional 50 percent tariff on China
item.description: The White House had already imposed a 20 percent tariff on Chinese imports over fentanyl concerns, meaning China could face an effective tariff rate as high as 70 percent.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Idaho mom who killed 2 of her kids goes on trial over husband's death
item.description: Lori Vallow Daybell, the Idaho mother with doomsday religious beliefs who was convicted of killing her two youngest children and conspiring to murder a romantic rival, is on trial again. This time, she's accused in Arizona of conspiring to murder her estranged husband.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump administration asks Supreme Court to block order to return Maryland man from El Salvador
item.description: The Trump administration on Monday asked the Supreme Court to block a court order requiring it to return a Maryland man who was mistakenly deported to a notorious prison in El Salvador.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US stocks dip after careening through a manic day following Trump's latest tariff threat
item.description: U.S. stocks swung wildly in a manic Monday after President Donald Trump doubled down on his tariffs, despite seeing how much Wall Street wants him to do the opposite.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Mega Millions tickets rise to $5, but the lottery promises more giant jackpots
item.description: Mega Millions players will get slightly better odds and should start seeing more billion-dollar jackpots, but at a cost — literally — with tickets for the multistate lottery more than doubling in price from $2 to $5.
item.dc:creator: Scott Mcfetridge, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Israel controls 50% of Gaza after razing land to expand its buffer zone
item.description: TEL AVIV, Israel (AP) — Israel has dramatically expanded its footprint in the Gaza Strip since relaunching its war against Hamas last month. It now controls more than 50% of the territory and is squeezing Palestinians into shrinking wedges of land.
item.dc:creator: SAM MEDNICK, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Swollen rivers are flooding towns in the US South after a prolonged deluge of rain
item.description: Rivers rose and flooding worsened across the U.S. South and Midwest, threatening communities already waterlogged and badly damaged by days of heavy rain and storms that killed at least 23 people.
item.dc:creator: Jon Cherry, Kimberlee Kruesi And Anthony Izaguirre, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: No state has axed its income tax on wages in 45 years. Now 2 Southern states are on a path to do so
item.description: About 45 years have passed since a U.S. state last eliminated its income tax on wages and salaries. But with recent actions in Mississippi and Kentucky, two states now are on a path to do so, if their economies keep growing.
item.dc:creator: DAVID A. LIEB, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Federal judge calls Trump's deportation of Maryland man 'wholly lawless' in scathing decision
item.description: A federal judge, in a scathing decision on Sunday, said the Trump administration had no legal grounds to arrest, detain, and deport a Salvadoran national living in Maryland to a prison in his home country, saying the decision was “wholly lawless.
item.dc:creator: Ian Swanson, KRON4

item.title: Researchers developing at-home smell test to detect Alzheimer’s
item.description: A smell test is less invasive and more accessible than other methods like PET scans, lumbar punctures or blood tests.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, KRON4

item.title: California town reports third fatality related to rare virus linked to death of Gene Hackman's wife
item.description: Investigators recently blamed the rare virus for the death of Betsy Arakawa, the wife of actor Gene Hackman.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Florida charter captain arrested after viral altercation with young fisherman
item.description: Police in Punta Gorda spoke out about the incident Saturday, saying "this type of behavior will not be tolerated.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, Fox 5

item.title: Poor air quality increases depression risk, study finds
item.description: A new study finds poor air quality is linked to a heightened risk for depression. Depression is a classified as a mood disorder.
item.dc:creator: Diana Falzone, KRON4

item.title: At least 16 dead in flooding and tornadoes as storms slash from Texas to Ohio
item.description: DYERSBURG, Tennessee. (AP) — Another round of torrential rain and flash flooding came Saturday for parts of the South and Midwest already heavily waterlogged by days of severe storms that also spawned deadly tornadoes. Forecasters warned that rivers in some places would continue to rise for days.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SCHREINER and OBED LAMY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jaguar and Land Rover maker pauses shipments to US as it develops post-tariff plans
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The maker of Jaguar and Land Rover cars is pausing shipments to the U.S. as Britain's struggling auto industry begins to respond to the 25% tax on vehicle imports imposed by President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: DANICA KIRKA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tariffs will make sneakers, jeans and almost everything Americans wear cost more, trade groups warn
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Sending children back to school in new sneakers, jeans and T-shirts is likely to cost U.S. families significantly more this fall if the bespoke tariffs President Donald Trump put on leading exporters take effect as planned, American industry groups warn.
item.dc:creator: ANNE D'INNOCENZIO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Storms tore up two of America's most iconic trails. Federal cuts have disrupted repairs
item.description: CAMPO, Calif. (AP) — Hiking the Pacific Crest Trail is a challenge, especially for adventurers making the entire run from Southern California to Canada, and Eric Kipperman’s job is to greet them at the start and lay bare the difficulties ahead.
item.dc:creator: JULIE WATSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Al Green says he’ll present articles of impeachment against Trump in next 30 days
item.description: Green, who vowed to bring articles of impeachment against Trump roughly two months ago, argued that Trump does not “deserve the office” he holds.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Baby boomers are buying more homes than millennials
item.description: Older buyers — who are more likely to purchase homes with cash — have been less affected by elevated mortgage rates.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, WGN 9

item.title: Protesters tee off against Trump and Musk in 'Hands Off!' rallies across the US
item.description: Crowds of people angry about the way President Donald Trump is running the country marched and rallied in scores of American cities Saturday in the biggest day of demonstrations yet
item.dc:creator: Dave Collins, WFLA, NBC

item.title: St. Louis family's prank leads to lobster's prolonged life
item.description: What started off as an April Fool’s prank turned into something more than what Brea Stenzel, her family and a lobster were expecting.
item.dc:creator: Daesha Gear, Fox 5

item.title: Teams battle it out in NCAA Women's Final Four
item.description: The South Carolina Gamecocks are headed back to the NCAA Championship game to fight for their second straight national title.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: JP Morgan predicts 2025 recession as Trump tariffs rattle market
item.description: President Trump's tariffs and their fallout will cause the U.S. economy to enter a recession this year, J.P. Morgan predicts.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Viral video shows Florida charter captain arguing with boater; police investigating
item.description: A viral video showing a fight between two Florida boaters has sparked both a police investigation and strong reactions from people online.
item.dc:creator: Sierra Rains, Fox 5

item.title: Fire erupts inside Disneyland parking garage
item.description: A car fire inside a parking structure at Disneyland Resort broke out, then was quickly extinguished on Friday, authorities confirmed. The fire was reported inside the Pixar Pals parking structure at about 9:47 a.m., per the Anaheim Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, WFLA, NBC
